notes: Flat (non-hierarchical) categories sum to ~100.02% nationally (Employed + Unemployed-parent + Student + Homemaker + Has-income-without-work + Other + Not-stated), confirming 'previously employed'/'never previously employed' are sub-splits OF 'Unemployed, seeking work' (0.84+2.37=3.21, matching exactly) rather than additional flat categories — do not double-count them when summing this table.
